nl_query: For each script with an active legal hold, show the hold duration in days, whether the hold overlaps with the board evaluation deadline, whether the script has already been published, and the case reference number.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, sh.hold_end_date, (CURRENT_DATE - sh.hold_start_date) AS days_held, au.display_name AS placed_by, CASE WHEN deh.release_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_published, CASE WHEN deh.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_board_extension, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_published_result FROM script_hold sh JOIN answer_script a ON a.id = sh.script_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = sh.applied_by LEFT JOIN data_retention_policy drp ON drp.entity_type = 'answer_script' AND drp.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN script_hold deh ON deh.script_id = a.id AND deh.hold_end_date >= sh.hold_start_date AND deh.hold_end_date <= sh.hold_end_date LEFT JOIN result r ON r.script_id = a.id WHERE sh.is_active = TRUE AND sh.released_at IS NULL ORDER BY sh.hold_start_date ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated table(s): script_hold AS deh. These tables do not exist in the schema.
